summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Falcon Web Studio marketing website. All core functionality working correctly with minor WhatsApp URL formatting issue.

integration_issues.issue: Opens api.whatsapp.com URL instead of wa.me format, though functionality works

passed_tests: Hero section loads with correct headline 'Websites That Turn Visitors Into Customers'
Navigation sticky behavior and smooth scroll to sections working
Services section displays 3 service cards correctly
Portfolio section shows 4 items with working hover effects
Why Choose Us section shows 4 feature cards
CTA section with correct headline and Email button working
Footer social links (WhatsApp, Email, LinkedIn, Twitter) all functional
Mobile menu hamburger button works correctly
Responsive design works on mobile and desktop
All animations and framer-motion effects working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix WhatsApp CTA button to use wa.me URL format instead of api.whatsapp.com (minor priority)
